request-form.name: name

prices.ethernet-text: Ethernet is a local network (LAN) technology for connecting devices to the network. Transfer speed from 10 Mbit/s to 100 Gbit/s and more.
prices.pon-text: PON (Passive Optical Network) is an optical interconnection technology that connects passive components without the need for electrical power to distribute the optical signal. Transfer speed from 10 Mbit/s to 10 Gbit/s.
prices.snackbar-text:
External IP address

(or public IP address) is your device's unique identifier on the Internet, provided by your ISP.

Key features:

\n
  • Uniqueness: Each external IP address is unique.
  • Accessibility: It allows other devices on the Internet to find your device.
  • Types: Static (constant) or dynamic (changing over time).

intercom.intercom-service: The intercom service is paid according to a public contract
intercom.cost-of-connection: The cost of connection depends on the system installed in the entrance of the house and does not include the cost of the equipment installed in the apartment

errors.page-not-found-description: Page does not exist or has been deleted

surveillance.bannerSubtitle: We install video surveillance for homes, offices, or businesses. See everything happening — even from afar.
surveillance.priceInfo: Price depends on number of cameras, camera type (Analog or IP), installation location (outdoor or indoor), mounting height, cable length, required DVR settings, number and types of power supplies.
surveillance.projectInfo: Yes, our specialists can create a custom surveillance project for your premises.
surveillance.remoteViewInfo: Remote viewing setup via phone starts from *** UAH.
